summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The supplied preflight artifact hydrates live state for 20 of 40 listed PRs; those are classified independently because the job says this is not a dedupe cluster. The remaining 20 refs lack hydrated live state in the compacted artifact, so they are scoped needs_human rather than mutating recommendations.
